opsworks.layer.loadbasedautoscaling.Down.Docs: An `AutoScalingThresholds` object that describes the downscaling configuration, which defines how and when AWS OpsWorks Stacks reduces the number of instances.

opsworks.layer.loadbasedautoscaling.Enab.Docs: Whether load-based auto scaling is enabled for the layer.

opsworks.layer.loadbasedautoscaling.UpSc.Docs: An `AutoScalingThresholds` object that describes the upscaling configuration, which defines how and when AWS OpsWorks Stacks increases the number of instances.
